-   add `--github-output` for nicer output in github actions \[[`e8a2056`](https://togithub.com/onsi/ginkgo/commit/e8a2056)]

##### Maintenance

-   fix typo in core_dsl.go \[[`977bc6f`](https://togithub.com/onsi/ginkgo/commit/977bc6f)]
